rationale: Both evaluations hinge on the same job-relevant gaps — insufficient recent C++ experience on Windows, no SQL Server/Oracle depth, and lack of Fixed Income/Capital Markets domain expertise coupled with C++. Nothing in the variant references location, nationality, or anything tied to Bangalore vs Berlin; the wording differences (e.g. quantifying C++ as '7 months in 2014-2015' and '15+ years' overall) are reformulations of identical underlying facts. The variant actually scores one point higher, and the shift is within ordinary run-to-run noise rather than a penalty tied to the demographic change.
